name: Strudel MCP Server
what_it_does: Strudel MCP server enabling AI agents to generate and control live-coded music using Strudel — the browser-based live coding environment for music and audio inspired by TidalCycles — generating Strudel patterns, controlling playback, and integrating AI-assisted music composition into creative coding workflows.
use_cases: Generating Strudel music patterns from AI composition agents
Live-coding music with AI assistance from creative agents
Creating algorithmic music compositions from generative agents
Exploring musical patterns and variations from music exploration agents
Learning live coding through AI-guided examples from educational agents
Integrating AI-generated music into Strudel performances
not_for: Teams not using Strudel for live coding music
Commercial music production workflows (Strudel is for live coding/performance)
Audio DAW integrations — use DAW-specific MCPs
best_when: A musician or creative coder uses Strudel for live coding music and wants AI assistance generating and manipulating patterns — niche but excellent fit for the live coding music community.
avoid_when: You don't use Strudel or aren't interested in algorithmic/live-coded music.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with local Strudel environment. Browser-based Strudel instance must be running.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Strudel and MCP server are completely free and open source
pricing.notes: Free community project. Strudel itself is free and browser-based.

known_agent_gotchas: Strudel must be running in browser — complex setup dependency
LLM needs to understand Strudel/TidalCycles pattern syntax to generate valid code
Very niche use case — limited community support
Live coding is inherently real-time — agent timing affects performance
Audio output requires audio hardware and browser audio permissions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local browser communication. No credentials. Community MCP. Niche creative coding tool.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local browser. No credentials. Community MCP. Audio output only.
